name: Tuna Turnovers
recipeInstructions:
1. Make a pastry by combining flour, salt, and shortening.
2. Roll the dough into a 12-inch square.
3. Cut the square into four squares.
4. Mix tuna, onion, worcestershire sauce, mayonnaise, salt, and pepper in a bowl.
5. Spread the mixture on the lower half of each square.
6. Fold the top half over the filling and seal the edges with the tines of a fork.
7. Place the turnovers on a cookie sheet and bake at 400°F for 20 minutes.
This makes 4 large servings.
